title: Deep Learning and Medical Diagnosis
text: Several studies show that deep learning models can improve image-based medical diagnosis when trained on large annotated datasets.
label: support

title: Limitations of Deep Learning in Medicine
text: Deep learning models may fail when applied to hospitals with different patient populations or imaging devices.
label: uncertain

title: AI and Scientific Discovery
text: Machine learning has helped accelerate scientific discovery in protein structure prediction and materials screening.
label: support

title: AI Hallucination Risks
text: Large language models can generate fluent but unsupported scientific statements without reliable evidence.
label: refute

title: Human Oversight in AI Research
text: Researchers argue that AI systems should be combined with human expert review when evaluating scientific claims.
label: support

title: Small Dataset Problem
text: AI models trained on small or biased datasets often produce unreliable conclusions.
label: uncertain

title: Robotics and Reinforcement Learning
text: Reinforcement learning has been used to train robotic agents in simulation before real-world deployment.
label: support

title: Scientific Claim Verification
text: Automated claim verification requires retrieving relevant evidence and reasoning over whether the evidence supports or refutes the claim.
label: support

title: LLM Reasoning Limitations
text: LLMs often struggle with multi-step reasoning and may rely on memorized patterns instead of evidence.
label: refute

title: Retrieval Augmented Generation
text: Retrieval-augmented generation improves factual reliability by grounding model outputs in external documents.
label: support
